actions.text: Due to the terrain of this sector, all the ores have setled to the floor and geysers and vents haven't been able to happen yet.
To extract resources, you will need to resarch the [res://textures/blocks/resource extractors/Impact Drill/ImpactDrillComplete.png]Impact Drill and place it on a resource patch.

Due to there being no vents on this sector, you will need to use alternative power sources.
You can either use solar panels or research the [img here]Graphite Press and use it with combustion generators.
Since there are no geysers on this sector to extract iron from, you will need to research the [img here] Iron Separator to filter iron out of sand.
Enemy fabricators will be actavating shortly, Good luck.
